sceneAudits.biggestGap: Harbor cost and severance beats drifted into commentary instead of staying in purse weight, horse warmth, and relay handling.

dialogue: Dagny's bargain tied to counted passage money
Sylvanas turning toward the horses before Jaina can argue
exit: dead chill of the sending-stone before boarding

sceneAudits.biggestGap: Boarding and coast-loss beats were briefly more lyrical than physical.

dialogue: Dagny's first north check kept against helm and open water
exit: shore reduced through rail, rope, and deck motion

sceneAudits.biggestGap: Several shipboard pressure beats leaned into thesis or analogy instead of seamanship, bodily backlash, and deck geometry.

dialogue: Dagny exchange grounded in one-word compliance and hull limits
Sylvanas rail corrections tied to waterskin, locked knees, and wet line
Cyndia broth beat tied to cup and deck tilt
exit: Sylvanas's hand on the ladder rung as the concrete memory of stopping

sceneAudits.biggestGap: Arrival needed harder physical proof of Northrend and Arthas's lead, especially in the burned harbor evidence.

place: shore path beyond the bay mouth
dialogue: approach callouts kept tied to pole, lead, and shoreline read
exit: dock holding still under Jaina while inland pressure shakes her hands

risksFound: arrival atmosphere briefly outran dockside specificity
fixesApplied: made Northrend threshold ride on crusted rigging, metallic light, and ship approach labor
expanded the bay evidence to three charred hulls plus the nearer burned longboat
replaced abstract inland pull language with bay-mouth and shore-path pressure
